name: sonatype_nexus
explanation: The Sonatype Nexus check authenticates against the Nexus Repository Manager REST API (/service/rest/v1/status/check and /service/metrics/data) using basic auth. The spec marks username, password, and server_url as required with no defaults. Without operator-supplied credentials, the metrics endpoints return 401, so credential discovery is mandatory and out of scope for a generic wire-level probe.
notes: Pattern D: spec-required credentials. Default Nexus port is 8081 (per the example) and the API paths are stable, but the auth requirement dominates.
